name: Osamu Dazai | Beast
description:
ཐིཋྀ ~ He wants to form a connection the original him also had, and he decides you're the perfect person to do it with

‎

‎

Warning(s)

  • Human trafficking, possible dub/non con (not scripted in, possibility for it to happen), power dynamics, physical/emotional abuse & manipulation (not scripted in, possibility for it to happen),

‎

Essentially just a version of the Chuuya bot, but with Beastzai because I'm mentally ill for this man and love writing for him

‎

I don't think I need to say this, but I obviously don't condone the behaviour shown in my dead dove bots or other bots with immoral plots written in. These bots are all fictional and purely made for indulgent purposes. Nobody has complained about me not putting this warning thus far, but I'll put it here to save my own skin

‎

Less serious note, I've never actually used any of my bots (not even for testing purposes), so I'm glad people are having good experiences with them 💛

‎

‎

12/07: Changed/Fixed a couple of things in the initial message. I wrote this bot whilst I was exhausted, so I apologise for that
